title: Retrieval Query and Result
description: The library retrieval contract (release-spec.md §7.8; model §2 Retrieval Query/Result; model §10 #5). A query against the archive index returns ranked candidates, each scored with a cooldown status and any retrieval risk codes, plus the media decision (reuse / modify / generate) the candidate set implies. This is the public anchor for retrieval-accuracy work; private judges and ground truth do NOT ship (DD-9). All asset references are $CONTENT_HOME-relative; absolute paths are forbidden. Structural contract only; instances are instance data and never ship in the repo.

archetype.description: Content archetype the media should fit.

rationale.description: Why this candidate matched (matched terms / evidence summary).

cooldown_status.description: Cooldown evaluation for the candidate against the usage ledger (DD-14; release-spec.md §8.6).

eligible.description: True when the asset clears the hard cooldown floor (default 14 days) and is not a byte-duplicate of a recently used asset.

cooldown_blocked.description: True when reuse is currently blocked by cooldown.

recent_use_count.description: Number of uses inside the cooldown window.

days_since_last_use.description: Whole days since last use, or null if never used.

duplicate_of_recent_use.description: True when the candidate is a byte-identical duplicate of a recently used asset under a different path.

last_use.description: Most recent matching use, or null.

match_reason.description: How the use was matched to the candidate.

risk_codes.description: Retrieval risk codes flagged for the candidate (e.g. wrong-brand, stale-text, requires-modification). The retrieval-lab code set lives in the calibration harness, not the runtime registry (DD-9).

hard_blocks.description: Subset of risk_codes that hard-block direct reuse of the candidate.

reuse_requires_modification.description: True when the candidate may only be used after modification (crop/edit), not direct reuse.

decision.description: The media decision the candidate set implies (mirrors schemas/artifacts/media-decision.schema.json; release-spec.md §8.5/§8.6).

chosen_asset_id.description: The candidate selected for reuse/modify (absent for generate).

total_matches.description: Total assets that matched before the candidate list was truncated to the limit.
